name: businessos-web
buildCommand: cd ../.. && pnpm --filter @business-os/shared build && pnpm --filter @business-os/workspace build && pnpm --filter @business-os/connector-sdk build && pnpm --filter @business-os/brain-sdk build && pnpm --filter @business-os/context-engine build && pnpm --filter @business-os/sdk build && pnpm --filter @business-os/ui build && pnpm --filter @business-os/visualization build && pnpm --filter business-os-web build
